title: Task outcome: Read-only consensus synthesis audit for local-first memory OS goal: preload Codex/Claude memory,
summary: Completed a read-only high-level consensus synthesis audit of DinoBrain against the local-first memory OS goal. Reviewed AGENTS protocol, DinoBrain context pack, top-level README/package scripts, completion conditions, hook/session/retrieval/observatory/install docs, and live metadata surfaces such as graph-health and SQLite manifest presence. No app repo files were edited.
claim: Task outcome for DinoBrain: Completed a read-only high-level consensus synthesis audit of DinoBrain against the local-first memory OS goal. Reviewed AGENTS protocol, DinoBrain context pack, top-level README/package scripts, completion conditions, hook/session/retrieval/observatory/install docs, and live metadata surfaces such as graph-health and SQLite manifest presence. No app repo files were edited.
request: Read-only consensus synthesis audit for local-first memory OS goal: preload Codex/Claude memory, write back useful knowledge, verify provenance, evaluate behavior, keep fast LLM Wiki retrieval, show Observatory state, and restore safely on new PCs. Produce P0/P1/P2 consensus matrix and disagreements/risks without editing files.
decisions: Treat the existing system as a strong foundation, not complete OS proof, because current evidence still lacks live trusted-prompt proof and shows degraded graph/source mapping state.
Rank live pre-response loop proof, provenance/source mapping, and fast honest retrieval/index freshness as the top consensus blockers.
Keep the audit read-only with no source edits, no lifecycle application, and no git sync.
next_steps: Run fresh live Codex and Claude proof after hook trust/reload and capture evidence in the verification registry.
Repair accepted-instance source mapping/provenance and rerun graph health until degraded state clears.
Refresh or build SQLite shards and ensure retrieval reports the intended fast path, or explicitly document lexical fallback as current mode.
Broaden real-vault behavior golden cases and memory-use audits beyond self-referential/verifier-only cases.

evidence.snippet: Completed a read-only high-level consensus synthesis audit of DinoBrain against the local-first memory OS goal. Reviewed AGENTS protocol, DinoBrain context pack, top-level README/package scripts, completion conditions, hook/session/retrieval/observatory/install docs, and live metadata surfaces such as graph-health and SQLite manifest presence. No app repo files were edited.
